n1_disclaimer: All weights in this file are derived from a single native (n=1). The dominant statistical risk is overfit. No weight in this file may be applied to cohort-level claims. Shadow-mode is the structural defense; promotion to production requires meeting all §3 criteria including two-pass approval and native notification.

approval_chain.pass_1_notes: Pass_1 surrogate review approved. mean_match_rate>=0.4 AND variance<=0.3 AND N>=3 verified by direct re-read of shadow file. No demotion (mean<0.4 OR variance>0.3 not triggered). See LL1_TWO_PASS_APPROVAL_v1_0.md §4 for tier rationale. Pass_2 = NAP.M4.5 at M4-B close (binding final gate).
